2604.19728.title: VLA Foundry: A Unified Framework for Training Vision-Language-Action Models
2604.19728.paper_summary: We present VLA Foundry, an open-source framework that unifies LLM, VLM, and VLA training in a single codebase. Most open-source VLA efforts specialize on the action training stage, often stitching together incompatible pretraining pipelines. VLA Foundry instead provides a shared training stack with end-to-end control, from language pretraining to action-expert fine-tuning. VLA Foundry supports both from-scratch training and pretrained backbones from Hugging Face. To demonstrate the utility of our framework, we train and release two types of models: the first trained fully from scratch through our LLM-->VLM-->VLA pipeline and the second built on the pretrained Qwen3-VL backbone. We evaluate closed-loop policy performance of both models on LBM Eval, an open-data, open-source simulator. We also contribute usability improvements to the simulator and the STEP analysis tools for easier public use. In the nominal evaluation setting, our fully-open from-scratch model is on par with our prior closed-source work and substituting in the Qwen3-VL backbone leads to a strong multi-task table top manipulation policy outperforming our baseline by a wide margin. The VLA Foundry codebase is available at https://github.com/TRI-ML/vla_foundry and all multi-task model weights are released on https://huggingface.co/collections/TRI-ML/vla-foundry. Additional qualitative videos are available on the project website https://tri-ml.github.io/vla_foundry.
2604.19728.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 VLA Foundry，一個開源框架，將 LLM、VLM 和 VLA 訓練統一在單一代碼庫中。大多數開源 VLA 工作專注於行動訓練階段，通常將不兼容的預訓練管道拼接在一起。VLA Foundry 則提供了一個共享的訓練堆疊，實現從語言預訓練到行動專家微調的端到端控制。VLA Foundry 支持從零開始的訓練以及來自 Hugging Face 的預訓練骨幹。為了展示我們框架的實用性，我們訓練並發布了兩種類型的模型：第一個模型完全從零開始訓練，通過我們的 LLM-->VLM-->VLA 管道，第二個模型則基於預訓練的 Qwen3-VL 骨幹。我們在 LBM Eval 上評估了這兩個模型的閉環策略性能，這是一個開放數據、開源的模擬器。我們還為模擬器和 STEP 分析工具貢獻了可用性改進，以便於公眾使用。在標準評估設置中，我們的完全開放的從零開始模型與我們之前的閉源工作相當，並且用 Qwen3-VL 骨幹替代後，導致一個強大的多任務桌面操作策略，顯著超越了我們的基線。VLA Foundry 代碼庫可在 https://github.com/TRI-ML/vla_foundry 獲得，所有多任務模型權重均發布在 https://huggingface.co/collections/TRI-ML/vla-foundry。更多質性視頻可在項目網站 https://tri-ml.github.io/vla_foundry 獲得。
2604.19728.author: Jean Mercat et.al.
2604.19728.authors: Jean Mercat, Sedrick Keh, Kushal Arora, Isabella Huang, Paarth Shah, Haruki Nishimura, Shun Iwase, Katherine Liu
